greeting: The gaol inmate sits close to the wall, knees up, studying every bootstep as if one might be his release.

entries.text: "A man without a hat and without witnesses. That is all the name I have left today."
"My job is waiting until Beall decides if I am useful, guilty, or merely convenient."
"This town hears what it wants and writes what it can prove. Mind the difference."
"The constable is fair when watched and tired when not. That makes him better than some."
